/CAL: INFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DAWT/X: DEFENDANT HAS A POSITIVEINFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/SATERM/MO PC 1385: DEFENDANT HAS A POSITIVE PROGRESS REPORT/

/CAL:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING/FAVRPT/X:DEFENDANT ENTERS INFORMAL DIVERSION/X:DIVERSION PERIOD OF SIX MONTHS, DEFENDANT MUST NOT PICK UP ANY NEW CASESOR HAVE ANY WILLFUL VIOLATIONS OF THE STAY AWAY ORDER/X:DEFENDANT MUSTCOMPLETE THINKING FOR A CHANGE/CONTD:INFORMAL DIVERSION PROGRESS REPORT/DO

/CAL:DEFENDANT ADD TO CALENDAR MOTION TO RELEASE CADS/X:PARTIES STIPULATETHAT THE SUBPOENAED CAD MAY BE RELEASED TO DEFENSE COUNSEL AND THE OTHER RECORDS SUBPOENAED BY DEFENSE COUNSEL MAY BE RELEASED TODEFENSE COUNSEL AFTERTHE COURT HAS REVIEWED AND REDACTED SAID RECORDS,/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 05-18-21 IS CONFIRMED,/

/CAL:APPOINTMENT OF COUNSEL/X:VOLUNTEER ATTORNEY LEO FISSEL SPECIALLY APPEARING ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENSE/X:CONFLICT COUNSEL GEORGE LAZARUS IS APPOINTED AS COUNSEL TO WITNESS KELLYHART/X:FUTURE DATE CONFIRMED/

/CAL: DA MOTION TO DETAIN AND DEFENSE BAIL REVIEW/X: VICTIM KELLY HART ADDRESSES THE COURT/X: THE PEOPLES MOTION TO DETAIN IS DENIED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1: KELLY HART/SA2: BROOKDALE AVENUE, SF, CA/SAORD4: 300 YARDS/SAORD/VD: 04-27-21/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TE: 90 MINUTES/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:MATTER HEARD BEFORE THE HONORABLE ALEXANDRA ROBERT GORDON/X:DA MOTION TO DETAIN FILED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/CAUSE1/LDPX:05-25-21, 30TH/60TH DAY IS 06-14-21/987,2/NB/X:NO BAIL WITHOUT PREJUDICE/CONTD: DA DETENTION MOTION, BAIL REVIEW & ISSUANCE OF CPO 04-16-21/DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING 04-27-21/TE:90 MINUTES/DOP/
